title: sign_request parses private key PEM on every outbound request
description: signatures::sign_request calls RsaPrivateKey::from_pkcs8_pem on every call. The delivery worker calls this once per delivery item per batch tick. The private key never changes — parsing it every time wastes ~1-2ms of RSA key parsing on each delivery. The parsed key should be cached after the first parse (e.g. stored alongside the private_key string in post_cache, or held as a thread-local / once-cell per persona). With a busy instance delivering to hundreds of inboxes in a single batch this compounds.
close_reason: Accepted: ponytail comment. PEM parse ~1ms, dominated by IO-bound delivery.
